title: Replace embedding-store with pgvector + HNSW; cut nearest-neighbor p99 by 12x
author: priya
description: Migrates the recsys embedding store from a bespoke Faiss-on-disk shard layout to pgvector with HNSW indexes. Simplifies operational footprint significantly (we run Postgres anyway) and gives us transactional consistency on embedding updates. p99 nearest-neighbor query: 480ms → 38ms. Index build time fits in the existing nightly window.

title: Internal LLM eval harness: deterministic scoring across providers
author: priya
description: Internal eval harness that runs a fixed test battery (RAG accuracy, instruction-following, refusal-calibration) against any model exposed by the AI Gateway. Outputs side-by-side JSON reports with statistical significance bands. Used internally to make the Sonnet vs. Haiku tradeoff explicit before swapping a feature's model.
